description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk with a sharply pointed tip, rising from a solid, rectangular base. The surface appears to be made of a dark stone, possibly granite or basalt, and features vertical engravings or inscriptions running along its shaft. The obelisk is monolithic, with clean, straight edges and a smooth, matte finish, giving it a monumental and dignified appearance. The base is blocky and robust, providing stable support for the tall structure above. There are no visible decorative motifs aside from the inscriptions, and the overall design is minimalist and austere. The object is reminiscent of classical or ancient Egyptian obelisks commonly found in urban parks or plazas.
description: A tall, dark stone obelisk with vertical inscriptions and a pointed tip, standing on a solid rectangular base. The design is minimalist and monumental.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the obelisk, with vertical inscriptions clearly visible on the shaft and the rectangular base prominent.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with inscriptions visible and the pointed tip and base shape unchanged.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same vertical engravings and the rectangular base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the vertical inscriptions and the pointed tip, with no additional features.
attribute_inscription: Vertical engravings are present along the shaft on all visible sides, appearing as stylized symbols or text. The style is reminiscent of ancient scripts, but the language and legibility are unclear due to the low contrast and stylization.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible aside from the inscriptions.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, solid rectangular block with no visible decorative features, steps, or platforms. It appears to be made of the same dark stone as the shaft.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, forming a clean pyramid shape with no additional decoration or embellishment.
